title: Disposable Extra Strength White Super Rigid Bagasse Plates 18cm Round 100% Compostable Biodegradable Sugarcane Plates for Family Events Schools Office BBQ Picnics Parties - 7 Inch - 50 Pack
features: 【Bagasse Paper Plates】 - Strong Bagasse plates are cut-resistant, leak-resistant and superior strength, 9 inches (23cm) size good for dinner and daily use, they are sturdy and durable.
【General Use】- Perfect for serving hot or cold food, and microwave and freezer safe, can be used in restaurants, cafés, bakeries, snack bars, gastronomy or larger events.

【Eco-friendly and 100% Compostable】- Made of 100% bagasse fiber/pulp, which is compostable and biodegradable. It is the ideal disposable items for replacing plastic plates, and good for our environment because they will totally degrade into soil after we use them.
【Microwave and Freezer Safe 】 - Bagasse Paper Plates can be used with liquids and hot foods in the microwave and be kept in the freezer without any issues
【Safe and Healthy】- the bagasse paper plates through a thorough quality inspection and testing process, they were also gluten-free, BPA-free, and wax-free.
description: Disposable Paper Plates Extra Strength White Super Rigid Bagasse Plates Round 100% Compostable Biodegradable Sugarcane Plates for Family events Schools Office BBQs Picnics Party Dishware Plates – 7 inch / 9inch - 50 Pack Biodegradable Bagasse plates are strong white compostable plates made from sugarcane plant. A strong paper plate in bulk. Available in 7 inch and 9 inch sizes. The bagasse plate is leakproof and very sturdy strong white plates suitable for many types of food with and without sauces. These disposable plates are a stronger alternative to our standard white paper plates and are very popular for use in and at schools, festivals, outside catering and events. On the bottom of the plate is a textured feel and the top where food is placed is smooth to the touch making it a good eating experience that mimics crockery plates. An eco-friendly plate alternative to soon to be banned plastic plates and polystyrene plates. 【General Use】- Perfect for serving hot or cold food, and microwave and freezer safe, can be used in restaurants, cafés, bakeries, snack bars, gastronomy or larger events. 【Bagasse Paper Plates】 - Strong Bagasse plates are cut-resistant, leak-resistant and superior strength, 9 inches (23cm) size good for dinner and daily use, they are sturdy and durable. 【Eco-friendly and 100% Compostable】- Made of 100% bagasse fiber/pulp, which is compostable and biodegradable. It is the ideal disposable items for replacing plastic plates, and good for our environment because they will totally degrade into soil after we use them. 【Microwave and Freezer Safe 】 - Bagasse Paper Plates can be used with liquids and hot foods in the microwave and be kept in the freezer without any issues 【Safe and Healthy】- the bagasse paper plates through a thorough quality inspection and testing process, they were also gluten-free, BPA-free, and wax-free.
